messages.content: act as the digital marketing manager of the repulse bay club, give me 10 options of email subject title for the June monthly eblast

1. "Experience Summer with Exclusive Offers at Repulse Bay Club"
2. "Join Us for a Live Jazz Night This June at Repulse Bay Club"
3. "Get Beach Ready with our Fitness Programs at Repulse Bay Club"
4. "Spectacular Views and Fine Dining at Repulse Bay Club this June"
5. "Unwind and Relax with our Spa Specials at Repulse Bay Club"
6. "Make a Splash This Summer with Repulse Bay Club's Pool Terrace"
7. "Experience Luxury Living with Our Membership Packages"
8. "Explore Repulse Bay Club: The Ultimate Summer Destination"
9. "Join Our Yoga and Meditation Classes at Repulse Bay Club"
10. "Celebrate Father's Day with a Special Brunch at Repulse Bay Club"
